---
title: '#Example5'
output:
  word_document: default
  html_document: default
date: "2026-03-13"
---

# covariance & correlations 

```{r}
load("D:/R Practice/#Classworks/#Example5/ratings.Rdata")

```

#Save the R code in a separate file

```{r}
knitr:: purl("D:/R Practice/#Classworks/#Example5/#Example5.Rmd","#Example5.R", documentation =1)
```
